etymology.description: Duplication of čľ› (čľ›) (xÄ«n, "bitter") -> symbolizes two prisoners accusing each other
etymology.interpretation: The duplication of čľ›(čľ›) (xÄ«n, "bitter"), which resembles two chisels or knives, suggests a scenario where two marked individuals are in opposition, reflecting a visual representation of recrimination or mutual accusation. This conceptual framework evokes the notion of quarrels or debates where two sides confront each other.
